name: The Picklr Exton
description:
The Picklr Exton is opening late summer 2025

This location will boast 10 premier indoor acrotek courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The Picklr membership is the most valuable membership available. Amenities include drinks, locker rooms and showers, restrooms, lounging area, stretching area, event space for booking parties or corporate outings, youth programming, a world-class pro-shop with the best paddes and pickleball equipment available, coaches, clinics, and lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The Picklr Exton is open 6am - 11pm Mon - Sun. The membership includes 7 Day in-Advance Court Reservations, unlimited access to Picklr tournaments and Leagues, unlimited open play, 4 guest passes a month, 4 clinics a month, access to demo the top 25 paddles on the market, reciprocal access nation-wide, discounts on PPA/MLP tickets, and access to the proprietary Wingfield AI Court Trainer and ernie ball machine rental.
fees: Members only — See website for pricing details
